libraryDescription:
This library, gui.ButtonWindow, provides a window containing arranged buttons as a GUI component.

In the standard VCSSL library GUI, GUI components are handled as int IDs, but the GUI component provided by this module is handled as theButtonWindow struct.

The ButtonWindow struct internally stores resource IDs and related data, but you normally do not need to be aware of its internals becausefunctions for creating and destroying it are provided. Direct access to its members is not recommended.
Specifically, create it with the newButtonWindow function and destroy it with thedeleteComponent function.

This module also provides overloads of standard GUI library functions so that the ButtonWindow struct can be handled almost in the sameway as in the standard library GUI.
For example, the mountComponent, setComponentSize, andsetComponentLocation functions are provided.

function0.name: newButtonWindow
function0.declaration: ButtonWindow newButtonWindow(int x, int y, int width, int height, string title, string labelText[ ])
function0.parameters:
(int type) x : The X coordinate of the top-left corner of the window. 
(int type) y : The Y coordinate of the top-left corner of the window. 
(int type) width : The width of the window. 
(int type) height : The height of the window. 
(string type) title : The title of the window. 
(string[] type) labelText : The array storing the label text of all buttons.

function1.name: newButtonWindow
function1.description: Creates a button window with its size determined automatically.
function1.parameters: (string[] type) labelText : The array storing the label text of all buttons.

function2.name: deleteComponent
function2.parameters: (ButtonWindow type) windowInstance : The window to be destroyed.

function3.name: getWindow
function3.description: Gets the GUI component ID of the window.
function3.returnValue: (int type) The GUI component ID of the window.

function4.name: getButton
function4.description: Gets the button corresponding to the specified label.
function4.parameters:
(ButtonWindow type) windowInstance : The target button window. 
(string type) labelText : The label text corresponding to the button to get.
function4.returnValue: (int type) The GUI component ID of the button.

function5.name: getButton
function5.description: Gets the button at the specified index.
function5.parameters:
(ButtonWindow type) windowInstance : The target button window. 
(int type) index : The index of the button.
function5.returnValue: (int type) The GUI component ID of the button.

function6.name: setComponentSize
function6.declaration: void setComponentSize(ButtonWindow &windowInstance, int width, int height)
function6.description: Sets the size of the window.
function6.parameters:
(ButtonWindow type) windowInstance : The target button window. 
(int type) width : The width. 
(int type) width : The height.
function6.returnValue: (void type) The array storing the size of the window.

function7.name: setComponentSize
function7.description: Automatically adjusts the sizes of the internal components to match the current window size. Use this when the window size has been changed externally.

function8.name: getComponentSize
function8.description: Returns the size of the window.
function8.parameters: (ButtonWindow type) windowInstance : The target button window.
function8.returnValue: (int[] type) The array storing the size of the window.

function9.name: getComponentLocation
function9.description: Returns the location of the window.
function9.parameters: (ButtonWindow type) windowInstance : The target button window.
function9.returnValue: (int[] type) The array storing the location of the window.

function10.name: setComponentLocation
function10.declaration: void setComponentLocation(ButtonWindow &windowInstance, int x, int y)
function10.description: Sets the location of the window.
function10.parameters:
(ButtonWindow type) windowInstance : The target button window. 
(int type) x : The X coordinate of the window. 
(int type) y : The Y coordinate of the window.

function12.name: hideComponent
function12.parameters: (ButtonWindow type) windowInstance : The target button window.

function13.name: showComponent
function13.parameters: (ButtonWindow type) windowInstance : The target button window.
